extDesc.message: Select any text to get explanations, translations, and context using your own AI APIs.

missingKey.message: ❌ You haven't configured your API Key.

errVerifyKey.message: Verify your Endpoint and API Key.

optAiDesc.message: Add the APIs you want to use. Only one configuration can be active at a time.

optProviderOpenAI.message: OpenAI Compatible (AIMLAPI, OpenRouter, DeepSeek, Groq, Local...)

optHistorialDesc.message: The extension saves AI responses locally to speed up repeated queries and save API requests. You can manage your history here.

cacheConfirmClear.message: Are you sure you want to clear the response history? The next time you select the same texts, the AI will consume your API credits.

rowNoApis.message: No APIs configured. Select one below.

privSection1Desc.message: HoverMind ('the Extension') does not collect, transmit, distribute, or sell any personal data of the user to developers or third parties.

privSection2Desc.message: All information necessary for the operation of the Extension, including API keys, user preferences, model configuration, and history of cached texts, is stored locally and encrypted on the user's device using native browser tools (Chrome Storage).

privSection3Desc.message: When the user selects text and requests a definition or translation, the Extension sends that text directly to the APIs of the providers configured by the user (such as OpenAI, Google Gemini, Anthropic, DeepSeek, or MyMemory). The treatment of that information is subject to the individual privacy policies of those providers. The Extension does not act as an intermediary or store these communications outside of the local device.

privSection4Desc.message: Any future changes to this policy will be reflected on this same page and notified in the Extension release notes.
